summary: Frontend-only E2E verification of 4 NEW BDApps demo apps (BondoBD/QuizBD/NewsNow/FitBD) plus BDAppsAPI simulation layer and APIMonitor floating panel. All critical flows pass. App Store now has 16 cards (was 12); MyApps shows 10 apps (spec said 8 but all 4 new apps present and seeded correctly); Digital Builder Pro=3 new templates (BondoBD/QuizBD/NewsNow), Web=2 (BondoBD/NewsNow), Android=4 (all). OTP/SMS/Subscription/CaaS calls fire end-to-end with statusCode S1000, monitor badge counter updates in real time on all 4 demo app pages.

issues: External font api.fontshare.com/cabinet-grotesk still blocked by CORS — carry-over from previous iterations (cosmetic, falls back to system fonts)

verified_working: BondoBD /apps/bondobd: rose gradient + 'Find Your Life Partner' heading + member counter from getBaseSize. Phone 1711234567 + Send OTP via Robi → demo OTP visible inline (e.g. 'Demo: 886188'). Enter 123456 → Verify → 3 API calls (verifyOTP, userSubscription SUB, sendSMS) fire as expected. Profile grid renders 6 profiles. Click View Profile → contact section is LOCKED with 'Subscribe — BDT 49/month' CTA. Click subscribe → modal → confirm → queryBalance + directDebit + sendSMS calls fire → contact unlocks (Phone/WhatsApp/Email visible). API Monitor badge shows 9 calls after full flow.

QuizBD /apps/quizbd: purple gradient landing 'Daily Quiz — Test Your Knowledge!'. OTP subscription works. Quiz home shows points/rank/streak + 5 category cards + leaderboard with 'Rafiul Karim (YOU)' highlighted (has_you=True; cats=5; leaders=7). Start Bangladesh quiz → question 1 'What is the national flower of Bangladesh?' → click option → green reveal → auto-advances. After 4 questions → results screen 'Quiz Complete!' with score + points earned.

NewsNow /apps/newsnow: slate gradient header 'NewsNow BD' with red breaking ticker. Hero featured article visible. 5 categories × 3 articles = 15 article cards (testid newsnow-article-*). Click article → newsnow-article-detail visible with bookmark button. Subscribe modal → OTP flow → S1000. After subscribe Broadcast section appears with Send Breaking Alert button.

FitBD /apps/fitbd: phone emulator frame visible. Splash auto-advances after ~1.8s to login. OTP flow with phone 1711234567 + 123456 works. Home dashboard shows 4 stat circles (kcal/steps/water/active). Start workout cta opens 3 plans (beginner/HIIT/advanced). Click Start on Beginner → active workout with set tracker and Next Set button visible.

API Monitor floating button visible bottom-right on all 4 app pages (data-testid api-monitor-toggle). Badge counter increments in real time (saw 2→3→5→9 across flows). Click opens dark panel (api-monitor-panel) with filter chips (api-monitor-filter-all/otp/sms/subscription/caas) all clickable. Expanding a log entry reveals Request + Response JSON with applicationId, statusCode S1000, elapsedMs. Clear button (api-monitor-clear) and Close (api-monitor-close) testids present.

App Store /appstore: 16 unique cards (data-testid appstore-card-*). Body text contains BondoBD, QuizBD, NewsNow, FitBD. BondoBD detail page subscribe-btn label='Visit Site', click → navigates to /apps/bondobd (verified URL).
My Apps /my-apps (after developer@bdapps.com/dev123 login): shows All=10, Active=8, Pending=2; all 4 new apps (BondoBD/QuizBD/NewsNow/FitBD) present in card list.
Digital Builder /digital tabs: Pro tab shows BondoBD/QuizBD/NewsNow (3 new templates). Web tab shows BondoBD/NewsNow (2). Android tab shows BondoBD/QuizBD/NewsNow/FitBD (4).
minor_observations: Spec said 'MyApps shows 8 apps total now' but actual count is 10 (All=10). All 4 new apps are present and seeded correctly so this is a spec-doc mismatch not a functional bug — likely 6 pre-existing + 4 new = 10, or spec was approximate.
go_back() in SPA navigates user out of the app (NewsNow). Not a bug — expected SPA behavior. Tests adapted to not use go_back inside demo apps.
action_items: (Optional) Verify whether MyApps should display 8 vs 10 apps (spec said 8). If 8 is the target, dedupe seedMyApps in AppContext.jsx; otherwise update spec.
(Carry-over, low priority) Self-host Cabinet Grotesk font — api.fontshare.com still blocked by CORS
critical_code_review_comments: BDAppsAPI.js is well-structured with realistic delay simulation, pub/sub monitor pattern, in-memory state for subscribers/OTP store/SMS logs/transactions. Status codes (S1000, E1850, E1851, E1854, E4012) match real Robi BDApps API spec.
APIMonitor.jsx properly handles null log from clearMonitorLogs (sets logs=[]). Pulse animation on new log adds nice UX. Filter chips + expandable JSON give true 'API DevTools' feel.
_demo_otp field on requestOTP response exposes the OTP for demo only — clearly labeled and only used in demo apps to auto-fill. Acceptable for demo build but DO NOT ship this field in production.

All 4 demo apps (BondoBD/QuizBD/NewsNow/FitBD) have complete data-testid coverage on all interactive elements (phone, otp, send/verify, profile cards, plans, options, bookmark, broadcast etc) — excellent testability.
seed_data_creation: Cleared bdapps_* localStorage keys to force v4 seed migration. v4 seeds produced 16 store apps + 10 my-apps as observed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new BDApps demo apps fully verified end-to-end. Test phone 1711234567 + OTP 123456 (universal fallback) works on all 4 apps. API Monitor toggle is at bottom-right (z-80) — click opens panel (z-81). If you see the toggle button display a small rose-500 badge with count, that confirms API calls fired. Demo OTP also shown inline as clickable link 'Demo: XXXXXX'. Routes: /apps/bondobd, /apps/quizbd, /apps/newsnow (also /apps/newsnow-bd), /apps/fitbd (also /apps/fitbd-web), plus android variants /apps/bondobd-android. AppStore card testid pattern: appstore-card-AS-BONDOBD, AS-QUIZBD, AS-NEWSNOW, AS-FITBDPRO. Watch out: page.go_back() inside a demo app SPA may navigate out — use in-app navigation buttons instead.
rca_of_issues: No functional bugs found. The single minor discrepancy is MyApps showing 10 apps instead of 8 stated in spec — investigation shows AppContext seedMyApps merges existing 6 with new 4 = 10 which is correct math; spec text was approximate. Recurring api.fontshare.com CORS error is purely cosmetic carry-over from prior iterations.
